hyperedges.label: Raycast Surface Ladder + Hairline Elevation System

nodes.label: Structured Data Extraction (Reviews, Comments, Profile/Feed Sort)
nodes.norm_label: structured data extraction (reviews, comments, profile/feed sort)

nodes.label: Brand Personality (Minimalist, Clean, Expert, High-Contrast)
nodes.rationale: Emotional goal is confidence, efficiency, and clarity; anti-references reject saturated SaaS dashboards, bounce animations, over-rounded buttons (>16px), and ghost-cards with blurry drop shadows.

nodes.label: Utility First
nodes.rationale: Design must never obstruct workflows; export controls and progress bars stay prominent and instantly understandable.

nodes.label: Deterministic Feedback
nodes.rationale: Long scraping operations need predictable progress states, clear success/failure indicators, and smooth micro-animations.

nodes.label: Harmonious Contrast
nodes.rationale: Crisp readable text meeting accessibility standards with color-coded accents mapped directly to target platforms (green/blue/orange).

nodes.label: WCAG AA Contrast Standard
nodes.rationale: Body and labels require ≥4.5:1 contrast ratio.

nodes.label: Dark Mode Switching
nodes.rationale: Support theme switching via [data-theme="dark"] attribute selector.

nodes.label: Reduced Motion Option
nodes.rationale: Disable non-essential animations for users who prefer reduced motion.

nodes.label: App Shell Layout (Header + Side Nav + Panel Region)
nodes.norm_label: app shell layout (header + side nav + panel region)

nodes.label: Dark-Canvas Developer-Tools System
nodes.rationale: Pure-near-black background (#07080a), monochrome dark surfaces with faint surface ladder, hairline 1px borders, no drop shadows; single continuous dark mode across all pages.

nodes.label: Marketing Page Is The Product
nodes.rationale: Chrome IS the in-product command palette at marketing scale; full-bleed product UI screenshots of command palette, store, and AI chat surfaces serve as brand decoration.

nodes.label: Four-Step Surface Ladder Elevation
nodes.rationale: Depth built from canvas (#07080a) → surface (#0d0d0d) → surface-elevated (#101111) → surface-card (#121212); no drop-shadow elevation.

nodes.label: Inter Typography with ss03 Stylistic Set
nodes.rationale: font-feature-settings: calt, kern, liga, ss03 site-wide; ss03 alternate g glyph is the brand's signature typographic detail.
nodes.norm_label: inter typography with ss03 stylistic set

nodes.label: White CTA Pill Primary Action
nodes.rationale: colors.primary (#ffffff) is the universal primary action; pure white IS the brand action color with black on-primary text.

nodes.label: Hairline 1px Border Elevation
nodes.rationale: colors.hairline (#242728) carries every card edge; system has no drop-shadow elevation.

nodes.label: WCAG AA Touch Target Compliance
nodes.rationale: All interactive elements meet WCAG AA at 36px+ height; store-search-bar at 44px exceeds AAA.

nodes.label: sharesTK.png — White Curved Share Arrow Icon
nodes.norm_label: sharestk.png — white curved share arrow icon

nodes.label: whiteBubble.png — White Outline Speech Bubble Icon
nodes.norm_label: whitebubble.png — white outline speech bubble icon

hyperedges.label: Raycast Surface Ladder + Hairline Elevation System
